question: Did the Football War last at least a month?
context: The Football War began on July 14 1969.
Therefore, it did not even last a whole week.
response:
<reasoning>
The Football War began on July 14, 1969.
The Football War ended on July 20, 1969.
The duration of the conflict was six days.
Six days is less than a month.
The Football War did not last at least a month.
<answer> No
claims: The Football War began on July 14, 1969
The Football War ended on July 20, 1969
The duration of the conflict was six days
Six days is less than a month
The Football War did not last at least a month
